_publications._publicationTitle: Transplantation of miPSC/mESC-derived retinal ganglion cells into healthy and glaucomatous retinas.

_contextSnippet: Prolonged culture of small organoids, seeded at 1,500 cells/well, up to day 21 furthermore doubled the yield of both Thy1-GFP+ cells...highly viable cells, which represented about 20%–25% of total isolated cells
resourceName: Dynabeads Mouse Pan T (Thermo Fisher) kit
details: Day 21 organoids yielded higher percentage of Thy1-GFP+ RGCs and doubled the yield of Thy1+RGCs overall compared to day 16, with highly viable cells representing about 20-25% of total isolated cells
